answers.text: 当前围绕上游进料流股 feed-44 的缺失压力规格生成候选提案；其余已选单元的告警都直接指向该未解决上游状态，因此建议先补一个最小的压力规格占位，而不对 heater-6、cooler-7 或 separator-7 做额外改动。

citations.label: 诊断 STREAM_SPEC_MISSING
citations.excerpt: Recycle Feed is missing pressure specification.

citations.label: 诊断 SEPARATOR_STATE_DEPENDENT
citations.excerpt: Recycle Separator behavior still depends on the unresolved upstream feed pressure.

citations.label: 诊断 HEATER_OUTLET_EFFECT_UNCONFIRMED
citations.excerpt: Feed Trim Heater outlet response may still be influenced by the incomplete feed pressure state.

citations.label: 诊断 COOLER_OUTLET_EFFECT_UNCONFIRMED
citations.excerpt: Recycle Cooler outlet response is still downstream of the unresolved feed pressure gap, so the cooler itself is not yet a confirmed root cause.

proposed_actions.title: 为 Recycle Feed 添加压力规格占位
proposed_actions.rationale: 唯一错误诊断直接指出 feed-44 缺少 pressure specification；其余针对 separator-7、heater-6 和 cooler-7 的告警都说明这些响应仍受该上游压力未定影响。基于当前证据，最小且可审查的补丁是仅在 feed-44 上补充压力规格占位，避免对下游设备控制方式或拓扑做无直接证据支撑的修改。

issues.message: Recycle Feed is missing pressure specification.
Recycle Separator behavior still depends on the unresolved upstream feed pressure.
Feed Trim Heater outlet response may still be influenced by the incomplete feed pressure state.
Recycle Cooler outlet response is still downstream of the unresolved feed pressure gap, so the cooler itself is not yet a confirmed root cause.

summary: 当前围绕上游进料流股 feed-44 的缺失压力规格生成候选提案；其余已选单元的告警都直接指向该未解决上游状态，因此建议先补一个最小的压力规格占位，而不对 heater-6、cooler-7 或 separator-7 做额外改动。
